prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve already done the hardest part—you *noticed* the resistance and you’re still here, ready to punch through it. Ten focused seconds is all it takes to flip the switch from dread to momentum. Start tiny, move one inch, and the task shrinks while you grow. You’ve got this; prove it to yourself in the next breath.
